generated_oml:
instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume)"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers for 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow operating at 12V or 24V"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "power supply unit"
]

instance DS18S20SensorA : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20SensorB : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20SensorC : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20SensorA, DS18S20SensorB, DS18S20SensorC
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "temperature measurements from three DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "2-parameter thermal dynamics model assuming uniform heat distribution and no heatbed heat accumulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "4-parameter thermal dynamics model accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ for message brokering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance PythonScipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy for calibration and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor data periodically read by low-level driver and uploaded to RabbitMQ message broker for transmission to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataReceived
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models (Model A and B) for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePrediction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "real-time monitoring for safety compliance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolation, HumanIntervention, AutomaticAdjustment
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "fault detection algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateEstimate
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "optimization of heating parameters using calibration algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationComplete, OptimizedHeatingParameters
]

instance DataReceived : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data received from physical twin via RabbitMQ message broker"
]

instance TemperaturePrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature output from simulation models"
]

instance SafetyViolation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Temperature outside safe operational limits"
]

instance HumanIntervention : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human intervention required for safety compliance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AutomaticAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heating parameters for safety compliance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detected in thermal incubator system"
]

instance SystemStateEstimate : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated system state from sensor data"
]

instance CalibrationComplete : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model parameters updated through non-linear least squares calibration"
]

instance OptimizedHeatingParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized heating parameters for thermal incubator efficiency"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4, CustomPCB, PowerSupply, DS18S20SensorA, DS18S20SensorB, DS18S20SensorC
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed activation, fan speed) generated by the digital twin are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which actuates the heatbed and fan through MOSFETs."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Components orchestrated via RabbitMQ: controller (Bang-bang control logic), low-level driver (hardware interfacing), and communication server (RabbitMQ), with data flow between physical twin and digital twin components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during the 'as operated' phase, where the digital twin integrates with the deployed physical system to monitor, predict, and optimize operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated via experimental comparison; residual error minimized using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver, with uniformity tested using three sensors to verify Assumption 1."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker (AMQP protocol) over Wi-Fi/Ethernet on Raspberry Pi for communication between PT and DT components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and DT components hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol implemented in low-level driver to ensure device safety during operation."
]
